title: ТЖ 1С — СУБД (DBMSSQL)
description: Куда уходит время СУБД и из какой строки кода 1С оно рождается. Архив ТЖ 2025-11-28..2025-11-30.

list.name: process_name
list.label: Информационная база
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT process_name FROM tj.agg_minute WHERE process_name != '' ORDER BY 1

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT process_name FROM tj.agg_minute WHERE process_name != '' ORDER BY 1

list.name: usr
list.label: Пользователь
list.definition: SELECT usr FROM tj.agg_context WHERE usr != '' GROUP BY usr ORDER BY sum(cnt) DESC LIMIT 200

query.rawSql: SELECT usr FROM tj.agg_context WHERE usr != '' GROUP BY usr ORDER BY sum(cnt) DESC LIMIT 200

list.name: db_name
list.label: База данных (СУБД)
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT db_name FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE db_name != ''

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT db_name FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE db_name != ''

panels.title: Время СУБД по минутам
panels.description: Сколько времени СУБД сжигает кластер: busy_workers = сумма длительностей DBMSSQL за минуту / 60 сек (эквивалент постоянно занятых соединений), p95_s = 95-й перцентиль длительности запроса (сек), queries_per_min = число запросов в минуту (правая ось). Источник: tj.agg_minute; применяется только фильтр «Информационная база» (в agg_minute нет usr/db_name).

targets.rawSql: SELECT minute AS time, round(sum(dur_sum)/60e6, 2) AS busy_workers, round(quantilesTDigestMerge(0.5, 0.95, 0.99)(dur_q)[2]/1e6, 2) AS p95_s, sum(cnt) AS queries_per_min FROM tj.agg_minute WHERE event = 'DBMSSQL' AND minute >= $__fromTime AND minute <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Профиль по базам
panels.description: На какие базы данных (db_name) уходит время СУБД в выбранном интервале: вызовы, суммарные секунды и доля от общего времени DBMSSQL. Отвечает на вопрос «какая ИБ грузит SQL-сервер».

targets.rawSql: SELECT db_name, count() AS calls, round(sum(duration_us)/1e6, 1) AS total_s, round(100 * sum(duration_us) / (SELECT sum(duration_us) FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'DBMSSQL' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name)), 1) AS pct FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'DBMSSQL' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) GROUP BY db_name ORDER BY total_s DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Из каких строк кода 1С рождается время СУБД
panels.description: КЛЮЧЕВАЯ ПАНЕЛЬ. Время СУБД, сгруппированное по последней строке контекста 1С (context_line = точка кода, породившая запрос): вызовы, суммарные секунды, доля от всего времени DBMSSQL, средняя длительность и число уникальных текстов SQL из этой строки. Только события с заполненным контекстом (~60% DBMSSQL). Именно сюда смотреть, чтобы понять, какой код чинить.

targets.rawSql: SELECT trim(BOTH ' \t' FROM context_line) AS context_line, count() AS calls, round(sum(duration_us)/1e6, 1) AS total_s, round(100 * sum(duration_us) / (SELECT sum(duration_us) FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'DBMSSQL' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name)), 1) AS pct, round(sum(duration_us)/count()/1e3, 1) AS avg_ms, uniqExact(sql_hash) AS uniq_sql FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'DBMSSQL' AND context_line != '' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) GROUP BY context_line ORDER BY sum(duration_us) DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Топ запросов по суммарному времени
panels.description: Топ-20 НОРМАЛИЗОВАННЫХ запросов (sql_norm_hash: литералы и хвост параметров ослеплены, docs/sql-normalization.md) по суммарному времени: вызовы, total_s, доля, avg/max, строки, число бакетов параметров, образец сырого SQL и строка кода 1С. Источник: tj.agg_query2; фильтр только db_name.

targets.rawSql: SELECT hex(sql_norm_hash) AS norm_hash_hex, sum(cnt) AS calls, round(sum(dur_sum)/1e6, 1) AS total_s, round(100 * sum(dur_sum) / (SELECT sum(dur_sum) FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE hour >= $__fromTime AND hour <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name)), 1) AS pct, round(sum(dur_sum)/sum(cnt)/1e3, 1) AS avg_ms, round(max(dur_max)/1e6, 2) AS max_s, sum(rows_sum) AS rows_sum, uniqExact(param_bucket) AS buckets, substringUTF8(anyLast(sql_sample), 1, 160) AS sql, trim(BOTH ' \t' FROM anyLast(context_sample)) AS context_line FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE hour >= $__fromTime AND hour <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) AND sql_norm_hash IN (SELECT sql_norm_hash FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE hour >= $__fromTime AND hour <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) GROUP BY sql_norm_hash ORDER BY sum(dur_sum) DESC LIMIT 20) GROUP BY sql_norm_hash ORDER BY sum(dur_sum) DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Деградация от числа параметров
panels.description: Один и тот же нормализованный запрос в разрезе бакетов числа параметров (размер IN-списка и т.п.): виден рост avg_ms с ростом числа параметров. Показаны топ-8 запросов по времени, встречающиеся более чем в одном бакете. Число параметров — метрика (значения обезличены в sql_params).

targets.rawSql: SELECT substringUTF8(anyLast(sql_sample), 1, 100) AS sql, param_bucket AS params, sum(cnt) AS calls, round(sum(dur_sum)/sum(cnt)/1e3, 1) AS avg_ms, round(sum(dur_sum)/1e6, 1) AS total_s FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE hour >= $__fromTime AND hour <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) AND sql_norm_hash IN (SELECT sql_norm_hash FROM tj.agg_query2 WHERE hour >= $__fromTime AND hour <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) GROUP BY sql_norm_hash HAVING uniqExact(param_bucket) > 1 ORDER BY sum(dur_sum) DESC LIMIT 8) GROUP BY sql_norm_hash, param_bucket ORDER BY max(sum(dur_sum)) OVER (PARTITION BY sql_norm_hash) DESC, transform(param_bucket, ['0','1','2-10','11-100','101-1000','1000+'], [0,1,2,3,4,5], 9)

panels.title: Долгие запросы
panels.description: Топ-50 самых долгих отдельных выполнений DBMSSQL за период: когда, кто, к какой базе, сколько секунд, сколько строк вернул, текст SQL (первые 200 символов) и строка кода 1С. Для разбора конкретных инцидентов «висело N секунд».

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, usr, db_name, round(duration_us/1e6, 2) AS dur_s, rows_ret, substring(sql_text, 1, 200) AS sql, trim(BOTH ' \t' FROM context_line) AS context_line FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'DBMSSQL' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) AND $__conditionalAll(db_name IN (${db_name:singlequote}), $db_name) ORDER BY duration_us DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Ошибки запросов (QERR) по минутам
panels.description: Частота ошибок выполнения запросов СУБД (событие QERR) в минуту. Всплеск = массовые ошибки (deadlock victim, конфликты, таймауты на уровне СУБД, синтаксис).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, count() AS errors FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'QERR' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Топ-10 строк кода по ошибкам запросов (QERR)
panels.description: Какие строки кода 1С чаще всего порождают ошибки запросов СУБД за период, и сколько разных пользователей затронуто.

targets.rawSql: SELECT trim(BOTH ' \t' FROM context_line) AS context_line, count() AS errors, uniqExact(usr) AS uniq_users FROM tj.events WHERE event = 'QERR' AND context_line != '' AND ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime AND $__conditionalAll(process_name IN (${process_name:singlequote}), $process_name) AND $__conditionalAll(usr IN (${usr:singlequote}), $usr) GROUP BY context_line ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 10
